name: Seal of Blasphemous Prayer
description: Notes This versatile seal grants Invulnerable upon use - It is one of very few items in the game to grant such a status effect, on top of the Healing and Damaging commonly showcased in most other tiered seals.
effects: On party: Healing and Damaging Healing & Damaging Range: 5 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) tiles Healing & Damaging Duration: 5 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) seconds On self: Invulnerable for 2.2 seconds
